title: Comes Alive Reworked
description: This mod is the best RP/RPG mod with npc's
body:
**Description:**

*   Villagers are now fully human and interactable.  
*   Many ways to engage with them: chatting, gifting, and more.  
*   Build relationships, each villager has their own personality and moods.  
*   Strengthen your bond and unlock the possibility of marriage.  
*   After marriage, raise children who can help with simple tasks around the village.  
*   Children grow up over time and eventually start their own paths.  
*   Play solo or with friends — even marry other players in LAN or SMP.  
*   Expand and improve your village, unlocking higher ranks as you progress.  
*   Optional Chat AI integration for more natural conversations.  
*   Customize appearances with an in-game skin library featuring thousands of assets.

***

**Credits:**

Credits to the original creator of the mod comes alive: [MCA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-comes-alive-mca)

Credits to the amazing team and project that inspire me: [MCA REBORN](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)

Respecting the license: GNU General Public License version 3
